examples.title: Simple Client-Server Resource Request
examples.description: Demonstrates basic client-server communication for resource sharing
examples.code:
// SERVER CODE
BEGIN
 OPEN_PORT(8080)
 WHILE true DO
 client_request = ACCEPT_CONNECTION()
 resource = READ_REQUEST(client_request)
 response = FETCH_RESOURCE(resource)
 SEND_RESPONSE(client_request, response)
 END WHILE
END

// CLIENT CODE
BEGIN
 CONNECT_TO_SERVER("server_ip", 8080)
 REQUEST = "specific_resource"
 SEND_REQUEST(server, REQUEST)
 RESPONSE = RECEIVE_RESPONSE(server)
 DISPLAY(RESPONSE)
END
examples.explanation: Server listens for requests and provides resources; client connects and requests specific resources

examples.title: Load Balancer Algorithm (Round Robin)
examples.description: Demonstrates load balancing to distribute resource requests
examples.code:
BEGIN
 servers = [server1, server2, server3]
 current_index = 0
 
 FUNCTION handle_request(request)
 target_server = servers[current_index]
 current_index = (current_index + 1) % server_count
 
 response = FORWARD_TO_SERVER(target_server, request)
 RETURN response
 END FUNCTION
 
 WHILE true DO
 incoming_request = WAIT_FOR_REQUEST()
 result = handle_request(incoming_request)
 SEND_RESPONSE(result)
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: Round-robin distributes requests equally among servers to prevent overload

examples.title: Peer-to-Peer Resource Discovery
examples.description: Demonstrates how peers discover and share resources
examples.code:
BEGIN
 peer_resources = {}
 known_peers = []
 
 FUNCTION register_resource(resource_name, data)
 peer_resources[resource_name] = data
 END FUNCTION
 
 FUNCTION find_resource(resource_name)
 IF resource_name IN peer_resources THEN
 RETURN peer_resources[resource_name]
 END IF
 
 FOR peer IN known_peers DO
 IF peer HAS_RESOURCE(resource_name) THEN
 RETURN peer.GET_RESOURCE(resource_name)
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN "Resource not found"
 END FUNCTION
 
 FUNCTION share_with_peer(peer, resource)
 peer.receive_resource(resource)
 END FUNCTION
END
examples.explanation: Peers register resources and search among known peers to find and share resources
